frame_label: Prenup / Alimony as Reverse Dowry / Women as Golddiggers
generated_comment: Beta, ab toh darr lagta hai ladko ki shaadi karne mein. Dekho na, kitne cases aate hain jahan ladkiyaan bas paiso ke liye shaadi karti hain. Phir thode din mein jhagda karke 498A lagwa deti hain, aur moti alimony leke nikal jaati hain. Saara kanoon ladkiyon ke favour mein hai aajkal. Bechare ladke toh fans jaate hain bas.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: Meena expresses concern about 'modern women' exploiting marriage for financial gain, specifically mentioning IPC 498A misuse and alimony as a means of extracting money, portraying men as victims of biased laws. This aligns with 'women as golddiggers' and 'legal system biased against men'.
persona_text: You are Meena. Age 51. Married. A homemaker in Lucknow. Your neighbour's daughter Pooja who is 30 just got a job promotion and her mother is very proud. You congratulate the mother sincerely. But walking home you are thinking about Pooja Ñ 30 years old, unmarried, living alone, promotion after promotion. You are sitting with your husband that evening and telling him what you heard and what you think about Pooja's situation and what her parents are doing or not doing and what kind of future Pooja is building for herself and what will happen when the promotions stop and she is alone.
